auth.login_meta_desc: Sign in to your school dashboard.

marketing.hero_title: Complete management for Bangladesh schools & madrasas
marketing.hero_subtitle: Admissions to exams, fees to parent communication — everything in one platform. Online payments, live dashboard, madrasa modules — built for Bangladesh.

newStudent.page_subtitle: Fill in the fields correctly. Name and class are required; the rest can be added later.
newStudent.camera_denied: Grant camera permission or use file upload instead.
newStudent.image_too_large: Image cannot be larger than 3 MB.
newStudent.photo_hint: JPG / PNG, max 3 MB. On mobile, tapping "File" opens the camera.
newStudent.session_hint_new: ✨ Will be created as a new session.
newStudent.session_hint_default: Pick from suggestions or type your own (e.g. 2026-2027).
newStudent.rf_id_hint: 💡 For gate attendance and canteen wallet.
newStudent.extra_guardian_body: 💡 If the student doesn't live with parents but with a relative (uncle / aunt / grandparent), add them here.
newStudent.extra_relation_hint: Pick from suggestions or type any relation.
newStudent.submit_hint: Fill name and class to enable the button
newStudent.page_subtitle_new: Filling out the form takes about 2 minutes. Everything can be edited later.
newStudent.no_class_body: You need at least one class to admit students. Sections are optional.

donations.page_subtitle: Critical for madrasas — create campaigns, accept donations, issue receipts. Receipt numbers are auto-generated.
donations.empty_body: Record your first donation using the form on the right. Receipt number is generated automatically.
donations.empty_tip: Create campaigns to track target vs collected amounts.

payroll.empty_body: Use the panel on the right to draft salaries for this month. Each staff's metadata.basic_salary feeds the calculation.
payroll.empty_tip: Set basic_salary + allowances + deductions on each staff profile, and salaries generate with a single click each month.
payroll.generate_desc: Drafts are built from staff metadata: basic_salary + allowances + deductions.

exams.page_subtitle: Term tests, annual exams, model tests — all in one place. Routine → mark entry → result publish in a single workflow.
exams.empty_body: Create an exam, set the routine, then teachers can enter marks.
exams.empty_tip: Create an Academic Year first, then add exams under that year.
exams.no_year_warning: ⚠ Create an Academic Year in Settings first.
exams.detail_marks_pick: Pick a subject to enter marks for
exams.detail_results_empty: No report cards yet. Enter marks and click "Publish".
exams.detail_no_routine: No routine entries yet. Use the panel on the right to add subjects.
exams.publish_confirm: All students and guardians will see the results in the portal. Confirm?
exams.publish_already: Results already published for this exam.
exams.unpublish_confirm: Unpublish results? Guardians will no longer see them.
exams.publish_confirm_new: Publish results? Report cards will be generated for every student and guardians will see them.
exams.marks_no_students: No active students in this section yet.
exams.marks_grid_locked_info: Marks for this exam are locked. They cannot be changed without principal approval.
exams.admit_footer_note: The candidate must appear for exams on the dates and times shown on this admit card.
exams.admit_inst_1: The admit card must be brought to the exam hall.
exams.admit_inst_2: Arrive at the hall 30 minutes before the exam starts.
exams.admit_inst_3: Mobile phones or electronic devices are prohibited in the hall.

certificates.page_subtitle: Testimonials, TC, character certs, hifz sanad — create a template once, then issue to students. Each gets a unique serial number.
certificates.empty_body: Pick a student and template from the panel on the right to issue a certificate.
certificates.empty_tip_no_templates: Create at least one template from the Templates page first.
certificates.issue_form_no_templates: ⚠ No templates. Create one from the Templates page.
certificates.templates_subtitle: Create one template per type. Variables: {{student_name}}, {{student_code}}, {{class}}, {{session}}, {{issue_date}}, {{serial_no}}.
certificates.templates_empty_body: Create your first template from the panel on the right. HTML + CSS gives you any design you want.
certificates.templates_empty_tip: For madrasas, create a 'Hifz Sanad' template and issue it with auto-generated serial numbers.
certificates.templates_subtitle_alt: Use {{variable}} placeholders in the HTML — on issue they're replaced with the student's info.
certificates.templates_form_body_placeholder: This is to certify that {{student_name}} ({{student_code}}) was a student of our institution...

assignments.page_subtitle: Create assignments, view submissions, grade them.
assignments.empty_body: Create your first assignment from the panel on the right. Students see it in their portal and submit there.
assignments.form_description_placeholder: Describe what needs to be done

reports.index_subtitle: Financial, academic, and operational reports — for data-driven decisions.
reports.card_fee_collection_desc: Monthly / yearly collection summary with class-wise breakdown
reports.card_income_expense_desc: Monthly fee + donation income vs total expenses — yearly P&L view
reports.card_expense_category_desc: Yearly expense breakdown by head and category
reports.card_payroll_summary_desc: Monthly list of all staff salaries + payment status
reports.card_student_enrollment_desc: Students per class with male / female breakdown
reports.card_attendance_summary_desc: Monthly attendance rate per class + section
reports.card_library_desc: Book catalog, overdue issues — open the Library module
reports.card_transport_desc: Routes and vehicle summary — open the Transport module
reports.card_inventory_desc: Low-stock items and total asset value
reports.fc_subtitle: Monthly collection summary — what was billed, collected, and what's outstanding.
reports.da_empty: No overdue invoices — everything is paid or not yet due.
reports.ie_subtitle: Monthly fee income + donations vs all expenses.
reports.ie_subtitle_actual: Monthly fee income, donations and investment returns vs all expenses.
reports.ec_subtitle: Yearly spend per head, largest to smallest.
reports.ps_empty: No payroll records for this month.
reports.se_subtitle: Students per class with gender breakdown.

attendance.empty_body: Once teachers start marking their classes, real-time updates will appear here.
attendance.empty_tip: Ask teachers to mark attendance from the teacher dashboard. Works offline too — syncs later.
attendance.realtime_hint: 💡 Real-time dashboard — these numbers update as teachers mark attendance.

scholarships.page_subtitle: Create scholarships for eligible students, then assign them to specific students. Invoice amounts will auto-adjust (wiring lands in Phase 4).
scholarships.empty_body: Create your first scholarship from the panel on the right.
scholarships.history_empty: No one has received a scholarship yet.

investments.page_subtitle: Track your institution's deposits, fixed deposits, business investments — all in one place.
investments.empty_body: Add your first investment from the panel on the right.

expenses.page_subtitle: Record every expense against a specific head. Month-over-month comparison appears on the dashboard.
expenses.empty_body: Use the form on the right to add your first expense. 24 default heads were seeded at registration.

fees.invoices_empty_body: Use the panel on the right to generate invoices for this month. If your fee structure is already set up, one click generates invoices for every student.
fees.invoices_empty_tip: Vercel Cron is already configured to auto-generate invoices on the 1st of every month.
fees.generate_desc: Invoices for every student will be generated from the fee structure for this month. Running twice in the same month will not create duplicates.
fees.payments_empty_body: Generate your first invoice and collect payment.
fees.heads_page_subtitle: 30 fee heads were auto-seeded when the school registered. Update amounts here or add custom heads.
fees.structures_page_subtitle: Set the amount and frequency for each fee head, per class. These amounts drive monthly invoice generation.
fees.structures_impact_hint: 💡 Showing monthly / quarterly / annual heads only
fees.structures_empty_title: Add a class + a fee head first
fees.structures_empty_body: You need at least one class and one fee head to create a fee structure.

editStudent.image_max_size: Image cannot be larger than 3 MB.
editStudent.section_auto_hint: 💡 Leave empty and one is auto-created — no problem.
editStudent.footer_hint: 💡 Every field can be edited here — photo, class, guardian, fees, everything.

studentDetail.no_code: — No code, please edit and save

studentsTable.confirm_bulk_drop: Move {count} students to "Dropped" status. Are you sure?
studentsTable.confirm_bulk_hard: ⚠️ {count} students will be permanently deleted — this cannot be undone. Are you sure?
studentsTable.page_subtitle_empty: Admit your first student now — takes under 30 seconds.
studentsTable.empty_body: Adding a student takes under 30 seconds. Bulk-import gets 100+ students in under a minute!
studentsTable.empty_pro_tip: Download the Excel template, fill it in, and upload — a whole class's worth of data is imported instantly.

adminDashboard.today_subtitle: {today} · A complete snapshot of your school
adminDashboard.context_hint: Each card's ↗↘ shows change vs the previous period
adminDashboard.legend_body: means improving vs the previous period,
adminDashboard.legend_body_2: means declining. For expenses, lower = green, higher = red. Change the period from the filter above — custom date + comparison all supported.

classes.page_subtitle: Set up your school's academic structure — classes, sections, streams. These must be created before admitting students.
classes.empty_body: Start with any class your school has. You can easily add sections and subjects later.
classes.empty_pro_tip: Add every class together — Play / Nursery / KG through Class 10 — to save time.
classes.banner_title: Just add your classes — sections aren't needed.
classes.banner_body: If a class has multiple sections, create each one as a separate class named like "Class Five (A)", "Class Five (B)". Keeps the system simple and every feature (attendance, exams, fees) works cleanly.
classes.multi_section_hint_title: Multiple sections? Just create separate classes.
classes.multi_section_hint_body: Instead of managing sections, name each one as its own class — "Class Five (A)", "Class Five (B)". Everything (attendance, marks, fees, reports) is wired per class, so this keeps the whole system clean and bug-free.
classes.count_students_tooltip: View all students in this class
classes.no_sections_yet: No sections added yet. Click the button below to add one.
classes.delete_class_confirm: Are you sure? Sections and students may also be deleted.

classDonut.title: Students by class
classDonut.empty_body: Once you admit students, their class-wise distribution will appear here.

portal.home_no_profile_student: Your profile is not linked yet
portal.home_no_child_body: Ask your school admin to link your child to your account. Then you'll see all the details.
portal.assignments_subtitle: List of assignments given for students — submit & see results.
portal.assignments_subtitle_short: List of assignments given for the student and submission status.
portal.assignments_no_link_body: No students are linked to your account. Please contact the school.
portal.assignments_empty_body: Any assignments your teacher posts will appear here.
portal.assignments_or_file_url: Or file URL (Google Drive, Dropbox, etc.)
portal.fees_subtitle_no_link: Your child's outstanding fees will appear here.
portal.fees_no_link_body: Ask your school admin to link you to your child.
portal.pay_secure_note: Secure — SSL encryption · we don't store your card/MFS data
portal.pay_online_disabled_body: Ask your school admin to configure SSLCommerz or bKash. For now, please pay cash at the school.
portal.pay_tip: 💡 SSLCommerz is easiest — card + all MFS in one place. bKash direct has lower fees but bKash-only.
portal.hifz_subtitle_empty: Your child's hifz status will appear here.
portal.hifz_no_link_body: Ask your school admin to link you to your child.
portal.notices_subtitle: All notices sent by the school in one place.
portal.notices_empty_body: When the school sends a notice, it will show up here instantly.
portal.online_subtitle: Join upcoming classes or view past recordings.
portal.online_empty_body: No classes are scheduled right now.
portal.results_no_link_subtitle: All your child's exam results will appear here.
portal.results_no_link_body: Ask your school admin to link you to your child.
portal.results_empty_body: When the school publishes exam results, they'll appear here instantly.
portal.support_subtitle: Got a problem? Tell the school directly. We'll respond quickly.
portal.support_no_tickets_body: Send your question or complaint via the form on the right.

teacher.home_subtitle: Today {date} · your classroom at a glance
teacher.home_empty_body: In class, take every student's attendance in 2–3 seconds. Swipe right = present, swipe left = absent.
teacher.home_pro_tip: You can take attendance even without internet — it will sync automatically when you're back online.
teacher.att_subtitle: Click your assigned section to take attendance. Just 2–3 seconds per student.
teacher.att_no_sections_body: Ask the principal to assign you a section or subject.
teacher.entry_empty_section: This section has no active students yet.
teacher.marks_subtitle: Enter marks for classes + subjects you teach.
teacher.marks_empty_body: Either no assignments are pending for you, or all exam marks are already entered.
teacher.assn_subtitle: Manage assignments and submissions for your classes.
teacher.assn_empty_body: Click the button above to create your first assignment.
teacher.sabaq_subtitle: {date} · click your section to enter sabaq.
teacher.sabaq_no_sections_body: Ask the principal to assign you a section.

settings.page_subtitle: Institution basics, contact, subscription — all in one place.
settings.subscription_tip: 💡 Upgrade before your trial ends — you won't lose any data.
settings.security_body: Enable two-factor authentication (2FA) to make unauthorized logins practically impossible.
settings.sms_body: Use AI to build professional SMS templates — fee reminders, absence alerts, exam updates — all in one place.
settings.form_logo_size_error: Logo must be 2 MB or smaller.
settings.form_logo_help: PNG / JPG / SVG · max 2 MB · used in header, certificate, invoice, marksheet.
settings.form_header_display_help: 💡 The fields you tick appear in the admin header. The first-selected field appears large; the rest become the subtitle.
settings.profile_photo_image_only: Please select an image file only.
settings.profile_photo_size_error: Image must be 500 KB or smaller.
settings.profile_photo_help: PNG / JPG / WebP · max 500 KB · square (1:1) looks best. Shown in sidebar + header avatar.
settings.profile_email_help: 🔐 For security, a confirmation link is sent to both old and new emails.
settings.twofa_subtitle: Extra security on your account — every login requires a 6-digit code from an authenticator app.
settings.twofa_active_body: Your account is protected — a 6-digit code is required at every login.
settings.twofa_step1_title: Step 1: Scan in your authenticator app
settings.twofa_step1_body: Open Google Authenticator, Authy or 1Password and scan the QR below.
settings.twofa_step2_body: If you lose your phone you can log in with these codes. Store them in a safe place.
settings.twofa_init_body: Extra security on your account — you'll need an authenticator app code.

staff.page_subtitle: Add and manage teachers, accountants, librarians, transport managers — everyone in one place.
staff.empty_body: Use the form on the right to invite a teacher or staff member. They'll get an email with a password-setup link.
staff.empty_tip: You're already in the system as SCHOOL_ADMIN. Multiple admins means work can be shared and there's a backup.
staff.invite_help: After sending, they'll receive an email with a password-setup link.
staff.perm_subtitle: Set granular permissions for this staff member. Role-based permissions apply automatically; extra grants can be added here.
staff.perm_no_grants: No explicit permissions. Role-based permissions are in effect.
staff.confirm_delete_body: {name} will be removed from this school. Their account in any other school is preserved.

notices.page_subtitle: One click — SMS + WhatsApp + App + Email reach 500+ parents in 10 seconds.
notices.empty_body: Write in one form, then send to SMS + WhatsApp + App at once. Live cost shown per channel.
notices.empty_tip: When SMS credit runs out you can still send in-app + push. Super admin can top up.
notices.new_subtitle: Send SMS + WhatsApp + App notification + Email in one click. Get a live cost estimate; edit until sent.
notices.composer_schedule_note: 📅 Vercel Cron sends scheduled notices every 15 minutes.
notices.cost_insufficient: ⚠ SMS credit may run short. Top up from super admin.
notices.tip_sms_chunk: • Bangla SMS longer than 70 characters → costs 2 SMS.
notices.tip_whatsapp: • WhatsApp is cheaper but needs a pre-approved template.
notices.tip_inapp: • In-app notice is always free — no per-send cost.

messaging.report_subtitle: SMS / WhatsApp / Push usage in the last 30 days. Top up your SMS credit before it runs out.
messaging.tpl_subtitle: Re-usable SMS templates — build with AI, personalize with variables, use in the notice composer.
messaging.tpl_empty_body: Use the form on the right to create your first template. The AI option gives you professional copy in seconds.
messaging.tpl_empty_tip: Use variable placeholders like {{student_name}}, {{amount}}, {{month}} — they auto-fill when sending.
messaging.tpl_form_ctx_placeholder: e.g. for a madrasa, Islamic tone

tickets.page_subtitle: Track every issue raised by teachers, parents, or staff in one place.
tickets.empty_body: Teachers and parents can open tickets from the portal; the inbox shows up here.

library.empty_body: Use the form on the right to add your first book.

hostel.page_subtitle: Manage residence buildings, rooms and student allocations.
hostel.empty_body: Use the form on the right to add your first hostel.

transport.page_subtitle: Manage routes, vehicles and student transport.
transport.empty_body: Use the form on the right to add your first route.

inventory.page_subtitle: Track stationery, furniture and other asset stock.
inventory.empty_body: Use the form on the right to add your first item.

subjects.page_subtitle: Set full and pass marks for each subject. These values are used later in marks entry and report cards.
subjects.empty_body: Use the form on the right to add your first subject. If a class is selected the subject is tied to that class; otherwise it applies to all classes.
subjects.empty_tip: Add common subjects (Bangla, English, Math) once and use them across many classes through class-subject assignment.

academicYears.page_subtitle: Create each session/year here. Exams, fee invoices and report cards all bind to an Academic Year.
academicYears.empty_body: Use the form on the right to add your first academic year, e.g. '2025-2026'.
academicYears.form_active_label: Make active (the previous active year will be switched off)

admissionInquiry.page_subtitle: Track every inquiry as a lead — timely follow-up after a visit drives conversions.
admissionInquiry.empty_body: Phone, walk-in, online form — no matter where the inquiry comes from, track it here so follow-ups don't get missed.
admissionInquiry.empty_tip: Tracking conversion by source shows which channels drive the most enrolments.

branches.page_subtitle: If you have multiple campuses, add each branch separately. Your primary branch was created automatically.
branches.empty_body: Create a branch from the form on the right.
branches.confirm_delete: Delete this branch? Related data will be unlinked.
branches.form_primary_label: Primary branch (the previous primary will switch off)

auditLogs.page_subtitle: All user activity for the last 30 days — who created, updated or deleted what, with a full trail.
auditLogs.empty_body: No activity recorded in the last {days} days.

insights.page_subtitle: Attendance + marks + fee overdue — three factors feed an AI-computed risk score. Compute regularly and quickly counsel high-risk students.
insights.empty_body: Click 'Compute risk scores' above. For each active student, the AI will analyse attendance, marks and fee overdue to produce a risk score.
insights.empty_tip: Compute at least once a month. For critical-risk students, call an urgent meeting with the parent.

madrasa.sabaq_subtitle: Today: {date} · pick a section to start entry.
madrasa.sabaq_empty_body: Create classes + sections first, then you can enter sabaq here.
madrasa.entry_empty_section: No active students in this section.
madrasa.hifz_page_subtitle: Every student's 30-para hifz shown as a heatmap. Click any cell to open the student's detail page.
madrasa.hifz_empty_body: When students enrol in the hifz stream, their progress will appear here.
madrasa.kitab_subtitle: Ibtedaiyyah to Kamil — set the kitabs per stage. All 6 stages were seeded at school registration.
madrasa.kitab_stage_empty: No kitabs yet at this stage.
madrasa.kitab_empty_body: Use the form on the right to add kitabs to each stage.

onlineClassesAdmin.page_subtitle: Schedule Zoom / Google Meet / Teams classes. Students can join from the portal.
onlineClassesAdmin.empty_body: Use the form on the right to schedule your first class.

dashboardNotFound.title: Page not found
dashboardNotFound.body: This URL no longer exists, was moved, or there may be a typo. Head back via one of the options below.

studentsExtra.row_modal_title: How would you like to remove {name}?
studentsExtra.row_modal_body: There are two options. History (attendance, marks, ledger) is preserved in both cases.
studentsExtra.row_modal_soft_body: Status becomes {tag}. Disappears from the list but the record is kept. You can re-activate later by changing the status.
studentsExtra.row_modal_hard_body: The student's core record is wiped from the database. ⚠️ This cannot be undone.
studentsExtra.bulk_page_subtitle: Enrol 100+ students from one file in 30 seconds. Classes and sections must be created first.
studentsExtra.bulk_format_body: Keep column headers in the first row. Supported columns:
studentsExtra.bulk_tip: 💡 Pro tip: create each class-section first. Student codes are auto-generated.
studentsExtra.uploader_preview_note: Showing first 10 rows — the rest ({count}) will import.

forgotPassword.title: Password reset
forgotPassword.subtitle: A reset link will be sent to your email.

authLayout.tagline: From admissions to certificates, fees to parent comms — all in one place.

superAdmin.dash_subtitle: Today {date} · all tenants at a glance
superAdmin.dash_empty_body: Register your first school, or start with test data.
superAdmin.dash_empty_tip: The free trial plan supports 50 students for 30 days. Upgrade suggestions appear automatically afterwards.
superAdmin.sms_page_subtitle: All schools' SMS credits in one place. Top up the ones with low balance.
superAdmin.sms_empty_body: Registered schools will show up here.
superAdmin.subs_page_subtitle: Plans, expiry, and revenue across all tenants
superAdmin.subs_empty_body: Once schools sign up, their plans and expiry dates will appear here.
superAdmin.schools_page_subtitle: All tenants registered on the platform
superAdmin.schools_empty_body: Register the first school to start serving tenants.
superAdmin.plans_empty_body: Run the seed migration to add the default plans.
superAdmin.plat_settings_sec_body: Every tenant table is protected by Row Level Security. All mutating actions run through requirePermission. Super-admin activity is written to the audit log.
superAdmin.plat_settings_msg_body: Each school tops up its own SMS credit. As super admin, visit the SMS Credits page to record top-ups on behalf of tenants.
superAdmin.plat_settings_soon: More system-level configuration options are coming soon.
superAdmin.manage_no_admin: No active admin found for this school.
superAdmin.manage_email_hint: As super admin, you can change the email without any verification link.
superAdmin.manage_password_hint: Copy the password and share it with the principal. They can change it after login.
superAdmin.delete_school_warning_title: {name} and all its data will be erased.
superAdmin.delete_school_warning_1: All students, classes, fees, marks, attendance, reports will be deleted
superAdmin.delete_school_warning_2: All staff & admin login accounts will be disabled (preserved in any other schools they belong to)
superAdmin.delete_school_confirm_label: Type the school slug to confirm: {slug}
superAdmin.manage_platform_owned_hint: When on, this school does not count towards revenue and its plan never expires. Use only for your own tenants.
superAdmin.inbox_page_subtitle: All inquiries submitted through the contact form
superAdmin.inbox_empty_body: Submissions from the contact page will appear here.

pay.success_body: Your payment has been received. A receipt was created and the school's invoice is updated.
pay.fail_body: Something went wrong. Your bank / MFS account was not charged.
pay.cancel_body: No money has been charged. Try again whenever you like.

offline.heading: You're offline
offline.body: You are offline right now. The page will update when your connection returns. Previously viewed pages are available from cache.

pwa.install_body: Opens as fast as an app, works offline too.
pwa.offline_banner: Offline — attendance and marks will save and sync once online
